'''竏噐-zh-l-f''' ('''kayazhlefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulgarise|vulgarise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulgarise|vulgarise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏噐-zh-l-f
|-
! Lemma
| kayazhlefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyazhlefoko|thiyazhlefoko]] || [[word:jiyazhlefoko|jiyazhlefoko]] || [[word:shiyazhlefoko|shiyazhlefoko]] || [[word:kiyazhlefoko|kiyazhlefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyazhlefoko|thuthuyazhlefoko]] || [[word:jujuyazhlefoko|jujuyazhlefoko]] || [[word:shushuyazhlefoko|shushuyazhlefoko]] || [[word:kukuyazhlefoko|kukuyazhlefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyazhlefoko|thoyazhlefoko]] || [[word:joyazhlefoko|joyazhlefoko]] || [[word:shoyazhlefoko|shoyazhlefoko]] || [[word:koyazhlefoko|koyazhlefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyazhlefoko|thoyazhlefoko]] || [[word:joyazhlefoko|joyazhlefoko]] || [[word:shoyazhlefoko|shoyazhlefoko]] || [[word:koyazhlefoko|koyazhlefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦyazhlefoko|thﾃｦyazhlefoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦyazhlefoko|jﾃｦyazhlefoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦyazhlefoko|shﾃｦyazhlefoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦyazhlefoko|kﾃｦyazhlefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayazhlefoko|thathayazhlefoko]] || [[word:jajayazhlefoko|jajayazhlefoko]] || [[word:shashayazhlefoko|shashayazhlefoko]] || [[word:kakayazhlefoko|kakayazhlefoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
